title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
We at Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Radiologist based out of Delhi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services:
Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services!
